name: postgres-cdc-listener
title: PostgreSQL CDC Listener
description: Native PostgreSQL change data capture via logical replication (WAL / pgoutput). Streams row-level INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE changes with no polling and no source-side triggers.

display.description: Streams real-time row changes from PostgreSQL using logical replication (pgoutput) and fires a Flogo flow for each INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE

settings.name: host
settings.description: PostgreSQL server host

display.name: Host
display.description: PostgreSQL server host

settings.name: port
settings.description: PostgreSQL server port

display.name: Port
display.description: PostgreSQL server port

settings.name: user
settings.description: Database user with the REPLICATION attribute

display.name: User
display.description: Database user with the REPLICATION attribute (ALTER ROLE <user> REPLICATION)

settings.name: password
settings.description: Database password

display.name: Password
display.description: Database password

settings.name: databaseName
settings.description: Database to replicate changes from

display.name: Database Name
display.description: Database to replicate changes from

settings.name: tlsConfig
settings.description: Enable TLS/SSL for the PostgreSQL connection

display.name: Enable TLS Configuration
display.description: Enable TLS/SSL secure connection. When enabled, configure SSL Mode and certificates below.

settings.name: sslMode
settings.description: SSL mode: require, verify-ca, verify-full

display.name: SSL Mode
display.description: require: encrypt but skip certificate verification. verify-ca: verify server CA. verify-full: verify CA and hostname.

settings.name: sslCA
settings.description: CA certificate file path (required for verify-ca and verify-full)

display.name: SSL CA Certificate
display.description: CA certificate file path (required for verify-ca and verify-full)

settings.name: sslCert
settings.description: Client certificate file path (optional, for client authentication)

display.name: SSL Client Certificate
display.description: Client certificate file path (optional, for client authentication)

settings.name: sslKey
settings.description: Client private key file path (optional, for client authentication)

display.name: SSL Client Key
display.description: Client private key file path (optional, for client authentication)

settings.name: connectionTimeout
settings.description: Connection timeout in seconds

display.name: Connection Timeout (s)
display.description: Connection timeout in seconds

settings.name: maxRetryAttempts
settings.description: Maximum reconnect attempts after a stream failure (0 = retry forever)

display.name: Max Retry Attempts
display.description: Maximum reconnect attempts after a stream failure (0 = retry forever)

settings.name: retryDelay
settings.description: Delay between reconnect attempts (Go duration, e.g. 5s)

display.name: Retry Delay
display.description: Delay between reconnect attempts (Go duration, e.g. 5s)

settings.name: standbyMessageTimeout
settings.description: Interval for sending standby status (LSN acknowledgement) updates

display.name: Standby Message Timeout
display.description: Interval for sending standby status (LSN acknowledgement) updates (Go duration, e.g. 10s)

settings.name: slotName
settings.description: Logical replication slot name (lowercase letters, digits, underscore)

display.name: Replication Slot
display.description: Logical replication slot name. The slot persists the stream position server-side for durable, resumable CDC.

settings.name: publicationName
settings.description: pgoutput publication name that defines which tables are published

display.name: Publication
display.description: pgoutput publication name (CREATE PUBLICATION ...) that defines which tables are captured

settings.name: createSlotIfNotExists
settings.description: Automatically create the replication slot if it does not exist

display.name: Create Slot If Not Exists
display.description: Automatically create the replication slot if it does not exist

settings.name: temporarySlot
settings.description: Use a temporary slot that is dropped when the connection closes (no durable resume)

display.name: Temporary Slot
display.description: Use a temporary slot that is dropped when the connection closes. Not recommended for production (no durable resume).

settings.name: createPublicationIfNotExists
settings.description: Automatically create the publication if it does not exist

display.name: Create Publication If Not Exists
display.description: Automatically create the publication if it does not exist (uses the Tables list, or FOR ALL TABLES when empty)

settings.name: tables
settings.description: Tables to publish when auto-creating the publication (schema.table). Empty = FOR ALL TABLES.

display.name: Tables
display.description: Tables to publish when auto-creating the publication (schema.table). Empty = FOR ALL TABLES.

settings.name: eventTypes
settings.description: Comma-separated event types to capture: ALL, or any of INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE

display.name: Event Types
display.description: Comma-separated event types to capture: ALL, or any of INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE

settings.name: includeTransactionMarkers
settings.description: Emit BEGIN and COMMIT marker events in addition to row-level events

display.name: Include Transaction Markers
display.description: Emit BEGIN and COMMIT marker events in addition to row-level events

output.name: eventType
output.description: Type of change: INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, TRUNCATE, BEGIN, COMMIT

output.name: data
output.description: New row image as a column-name keyed object (INSERT/UPDATE)

output.name: oldData
output.description: Previous row image (UPDATE/DELETE; full row requires REPLICA IDENTITY FULL)

output.name: lsn
output.description: WAL log sequence number (LSN) of the change
